reason: REINFORCE (no clip) + lambda_il=0.5 caused significant forgetting. Stored wm=-0.0147 and inference wm=-0.0186, both well below the IL baseline (-0.0037) and v07d5 inference baseline (-0.0009). Removing the PPO clip removed the trust-region constraint; the weaker IL anchor (0.5) allowed unconstrained gradient steps that drove the policy away from IL without learning to win. Win rate also slightly declined (0.340→0.335). All hard gates passed.
artifact_reuse: v06d18 feature matrix, IL weights, decision rows (declared)
note_on_smoke_mode: RUN_MODE=smoke env var was NOT passed to the Jupyter kernel (colab_kernel_launcher does not inherit shell env vars). Smoke run executed 50 iters x 200 games (full parameters). This is effectively the full run result. For future experiments, inject RUN_MODE via Cell[1] from a file or kernel args.

training_summary.forgetting_note: IL_baseline=-0.0037 → post_RL=-0.0147 (delta=-0.0110). High-variance REINFORCE + weaker IL anchor drove policy away from IL without learning to win.

exploration_summary: REINFORCE (no clip) + lambda_il=0.5 failed. High gradient variance without importance ratio clipping caused unstable updates. Reducing IL anchor to 0.5 was insufficient to stabilize learning — the model forgot IL behavior without gaining RL signal. Next: test lambda_il reduction with PPO clip retained, or offline PPO on v07d6 episode buffer (481k decisions).
known_risks: REINFORCE has high variance — without a trust-region constraint, updates can be large and noisy
lambda_il=0.5 may be too weak to prevent forgetting when combined with unconstrained updates
win_rate slightly declined (0.340→0.335) suggesting no game-level learning improvement
next_candidates: [conservative] v07d7: offline PPO on v07d6 episode buffer (481k decisions). Test whether PPO with stored episodes (now available) learns better than online. Primary metric: inference-feature winner_margin.
[conservative] v07d7-alt: keep PPO clip, reduce lambda_il to 0.3. Conservative reduction without removing trust region. Test if PPO clip prevents forgetting that REINFORCE showed.
[aggressive] v07d8: remove dim96 entirely from feature vector; retrain IL from scratch on 96-dim features. Removes leakage source entirely.
[aggressive] v07d9: lambda_il=0.1 with PPO — extreme IL reduction while keeping clip. Measures how much RL can dominate before forgetting sets in.
